docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,063.79 FILED BY SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT BOSSETTE, JOSEPH A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-29-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08
